title: Oreinotinus hartwegii
taxonomy: Oreinotinus hartwegii belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is part of the genus Oreinotinus. It is a species of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. Oreinotinus hartwegii is classified under the kingdom Plantae and further classified into the phylum Magnoliophyta, and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Oreinotinus hartwegii is not well-documented, so further research is needed for a more comprehensive understanding.
